topic: Gumloop vs n8n vs Zapier 2026: AI-Native Automation Compared

key_points: Covers all three tools with use-case-based recommendations
Distinguishes AI-first (Gumloop) vs open-source control (n8n) vs plug-and-play (Zapier)
Discusses credit vs task vs execution-based pricing models
Recommends Gumloop for AI-heavy workflows, n8n for developers, Zapier for SMBs
Focuses on n8n vs Zapier with deep dive into AI agent capabilities
n8n supports LangChain, local LLMs (Ollama), vector DBs natively
Zapier limited to prompt→output OpenAI steps with no chaining or memory
n8n wins for true agentic workflows; Zapier better for simple trigger-action automation
Detailed Gumloop vs n8n head-to-head for 2026
Gumloop AI integration is native—no external API keys needed
n8n open-source with community nodes and full self-hosting option
Gumloop easier for non-technical users; n8n better for technical customization
Five-way comparison including Make and Lindy.ai
Positions Gumloop as AI-native category leader post Series B
Zapier rebranded as 'AI Orchestration Platform' but still task-based billing
n8n $180M Series C positions it as enterprise-grade open-source challenger
Developer-focused comparison with real-world workflow examples
n8n ~90% cost saving vs Zapier at scale (10k runs/month benchmark)
Zapier has 7,000+ integrations vs n8n's ~1,000 native + HTTP Request node
Make (formerly Integromat) positioned as middle ground between the two

stats.fact: Gumloop raised $50M Series B in March 2026 led by Benchmark, bringing total funding to $70.6M
Gumloop customers include Shopify, Ramp, Gusto, Samsara, Instacart, and Opendoor; Shopify automated 20 million actions using Gumloop
Gumloop agents with Skills achieve 89% first-attempt success rate, up from 55%
n8n raised $180M Series C in October 2025 led by Accel at $2.5B valuation, with Nvidia (NVentures) participation
n8n reached $40M ARR in July 2025, with 6x user growth and 10x revenue growth in 2025
n8n has over 230,000 active users globally and serves 3,000+ enterprise customers including 34% of Fortune 500
Zapier serves 750,000+ customers as of 2026 with 7,000+ app integrations
Zapier's 2026 pricing: Free (100 tasks/mo), Professional ($19.99/mo for 750 tasks), Team ($69/mo for 2,000 tasks), Enterprise (custom)
Global workflow automation market valued at $26.01B in 2026, projected to reach $40.77B by 2031 at 9.41% CAGR
AI agents market expected to reach $10.69B in 2026; 40% of enterprise applications will include AI agents by 2026
n8n self-hosted costs ~$10/month vs Zapier charging hundreds for equivalent 10,000 workflow runs (8-step workflows)
Zapier Trustpilot score of 1.4/5 in 2026 with complaints around surprise billing and task overages
